metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when either event is unsupported; Undefined when instructions are zero
metrics.physical_meaning: 平均每退休一條指令消耗的 CPU cycles；越高通常代表等待或低效率越多。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when instructions or effective time are unavailable
metrics.physical_meaning: 每秒退休的百萬指令數；依有效時間基準估算。

metrics.missing_behavior: Missing when cycles or effective time are unavailable
metrics.physical_meaning: 每秒累積的百萬 CPU cycles；用來比較同一時間基準下的 CPU 活動量。
